pageProps.content:
["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","p",null,{"children":["$r","strong",null,{"children":["注：该镜像是 Homebrew / Linuxbrew 源程序以及 formula / cask 索引的镜像（即 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"brew update"}]," 时所更新内容）。镜像站同时提供相应的二进制预编译包的镜像，请参考 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"../homebrew-bottles/","children":"Homebrew bottles 镜像使用帮助"}]]}]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["镜像站提供了 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://github.com/Homebrew","rel":"nofollow","children":"https://github.com/Homebrew"}]," 组织下的以下 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"repo"}],"：",["$r","code",null,{"children":"brew"}],", ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"homebrew-core"}],", ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"homebrew-cask"}],", ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"homebrew-command-not-found"}],", ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"install"}],"。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["$r","strong",null,{"children":["注：自 brew 4.0.0 (2023 年 2 月 16 日) 起，",["$r","code",null,{"children":"HOMEBREW_INSTALL_FROM_API"}]," 会成为默认行为，无需设置。大部分用户无需再克隆 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"homebrew-core"}]," 仓库，故无需设置 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"HOMEBREW_CORE_GIT_REMOTE"}]," 环境变量；但若需要运行 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"brew"}]," 的开发命令或者 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"brew"}]," 安装在非官方支持的默认 prefix 位置，则仍需设置 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"HOMEBREW_CORE_GIT_REMOTE"}]," 环境变量。如果不想通过 API 安装，可以设置 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"HOMEBREW_NO_INSTALL_FROM_API=1"}],"。"]}]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["$r","strong",null,{"children":["注：目前，",["$r","code",null,{"children":"homebrew-cask-{drivers,versions,fonts}"}]," 已被弃用，所有 cask 合并至 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"homebrew-cask"}]," 仓库。本帮助内已移除克隆这些仓库的命令。已克隆用户（",["$r","code",null,{"children":"brew tap"}]," 查看）可使用 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"brew untap"}]," 移除废弃的仓库。"]}]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["$r","strong",null,{"children":["注：截止到 brew 4.6.12，",["$r","code",null,{"children":"homebrew-{services,bundle,homebrew-command-not-found}"}]," 均已被弃用，所有 tap 合并至 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"brew"}]," 仓库。本帮助内已移除克隆这些仓库的命令。已克隆用户（",["$r","code",null,{"children":"brew tap"}]," 查看）可使用 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"brew untap"}]," 移除废弃的仓库。"]}]}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"首次安装-homebrew--linuxbrew","children":"首次安装 Homebrew / Linuxbrew"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"首先，需要确保系统中安装了 bash、git 和 curl，对于 macOS 用户需额外要求安装 Command Line Tools (CLT) for Xcode。"}],"
",["$r","ul",null,{"children":["
",["$r","li",null,{"children":["对于 macOS 用户，系统自带 bash、git 和 curl，在命令行输入 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"xcode-select --install"}]," 安装 CLT for Xcode 即可。"]}],"
",["$r","li",null,{"children":"对于 Linux 用户，系统自带 bash，仅需额外安装 git 和 curl。"}],"
"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"接着，在终端输入以下几行命令设置环境变量："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-0","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["前往 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"../homebrew-bottles/","children":"Homebrew bottles 镜像使用帮助"}],"中「临时替换」一节设置好 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"HOMEBREW_API_DOMAIN"}]," 与 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"HOMEBREW_BOTTLE_DOMAIN"}],"。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["前往 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"../pypi/","children":"PyPI 镜像使用帮助"}],"中「Homebrew」一节设置好 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"HOMEBREW_PIP_INDEX_URL"}],"。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["$r","em",null,{"children":["注：自 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"brew"}]," 4.0 起，",["$r","code",null,{"children":"HOMEBREW_INSTALL_FROM_API"}]," 会成为默认行为，无需设置；大部分用户无需再克隆 homebrew/core 仓库，故无需设置 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"HOMEBREW_CORE_GIT_REMOTE"}]," 环境变量。但若需要运行 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"brew"}]," 的开发命令或者 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"brew"}]," 安装在非官方支持的默认 prefix 位置，则仍需设置  ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"HOMEBREW_CORE_GIT_REMOTE"}]," 环境变量；如果不想通过 API 安装，可以设置 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"HOMEBREW_NO_INSTALL_FROM_API=1"}],"。"]}]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"最后，在终端运行以下命令以安装 Homebrew / Linuxbrew："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-1","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["这样在首次安装的时候也可以使用镜像。更多信息请参考 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://docs.brew.sh/Installation","rel":"nofollow","children":"Homebrew 官方安装文档"}],"。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["$r","strong",null,{"children":"安装成功后需将 brew 程序的相关路径加入到环境变量中："}]}],"
",["$r","ul",null,{"children":["
",["$r","li",null,{"children":["
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["以下针对基于 Apple Silicon CPU 设备上的 macOS 系统（命令行运行 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"uname -m"}]," 应输出 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"arm64"}],"）上的 Homebrew："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-2","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["对基于 Intel CPU 设备上的 macOS 系统（命令行运行 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"uname -m"}]," 应输出 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"x86_64"}],"）的用户可跳过本步。"]}],"
"]}],"
",["$r","li",null,{"children":["
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"以下针对 Linux 系统上的 Linuxbrew："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-3","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["参考了 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://docs.brew.sh/Homebrew-on-Linux","rel":"nofollow","children":"https://docs.brew.sh/Homebrew-on-Linux"}],"。"]}],"
"]}],"
"]}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"替换现有仓库上游","children":"替换现有仓库上游"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"替换 brew 程序本身的源，Homebrew / Linuxbrew 相同："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-4","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["前往 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"../homebrew-bottles/","children":"Homebrew bottles 镜像使用帮助"}],"中「临时替换」一节设置好 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"HOMEBREW_API_DOMAIN"}]]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"以下针对 macOS 系统上的 Homebrew："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-5","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"以下针对 Linux 系统上的 Linuxbrew："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-6","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["$r","strong",null,{"children":["注：如果用户设置了环境变量 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"HOMEBREW_BREW_GIT_REMOTE"}]," 和 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"HOMEBREW_CORE_GIT_REMOTE"}],"，则每次执行 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"brew update"}]," 时，",["$r","code",null,{"children":"brew"}]," 程序本身和 Core Tap (",["$r","code",null,{"children":"homebrew-core"}],") 的远程将被自动设置。推荐用户将这两个环境变量设置加入 shell 的 profile 设置中。"]}]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-7","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["对于 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"HOMEBREW_API_DOMAIN"}]," 与其余 bottles 相关环境变量的持久化，可以参考 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"../homebrew-bottles/","children":"Homebrew Bottles 帮助"}],"。"]}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"复原仓库上游","children":"复原仓库上游"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"(感谢 Snowonion Lee 提供说明)"}],"
",["$r","ul",null,{"children":["
",["$r","li",null,{"children":["
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"以下针对 macOS 系统上的 Homebrew"}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-8","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
"]}],"
",["$r","li",null,{"children":["
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"以下针对 Linux 系统上的 Linuxbrew"}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-9","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
"]}],"
"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["$r","strong",null,{"children":["注：重置回默认远程后，用户应该删除 shell 的 profile 设置中的环境变量 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"HOMEBREW_BREW_GIT_REMOTE"}]," 和 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"HOMEBREW_CORE_GIT_REMOTE"}]," 以免运行 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"brew update"}]," 时远程再次被更换。"]}]}]]}]

{code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("export HOMEBREW_BREW_GIT_REMOTE="");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/brew.git"");t.b("
" + i);t.b("export HOMEBREW_CORE_GIT_REMOTE="");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/homebrew-core.git"");t.b("
" + i);t.b("export HOMEBREW_INSTALL_FROM_API=1");t.b("

compiledTemplates.template-1:
{code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("# 从镜像下载安装脚本并安装 Homebrew / Linuxbrew");t.b("
" + i);t.b("git clone --depth=1 ");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/install.git brew-install");t.b("
" + i);t.b("/bin/bash brew-install/install.sh");t.b("
" + i);t.b("rm -rf brew-install");t.b("
");t.b("
" + i);t.b("# 也可从 GitHub 获取官方安装脚本安装 Homebrew / Linuxbrew");t.b("
" + i);t.b("/bin/bash -c "$(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Homebrew/install/HEAD/install.sh)"");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
compiledTemplates.template-2: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("test -r ~/.bash_profile && echo 'eval \"$(/opt/homebrew/bin/brew shellenv)\"' >> ~/.bash_profile");t.b("\n" + i);t.b("test -r ~/.zprofile && echo 'eval \"$(/opt/homebrew/bin/brew shellenv)\"' >> ~/.zprofile");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
compiledTemplates.template-3:
{code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("test -d ~/.linuxbrew && eval "$(~/.linuxbrew/bin/brew shellenv)"");t.b("
" + i);t.b("test -d /home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew && eval "$(/home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/bin/brew shellenv)"");t.b("
" + i);t.b("test -r ~/.bash_profile && echo "eval \"\$($(brew --prefix)/bin/brew shellenv)\"" >> ~/.bash_profile");t.b("
" + i);t.b("test -r ~/.profile && echo "eval \"\$($(brew --prefix)/bin/brew shellenv)\"" >> ~/.profile");t.b("
" + i);t.b("test -r ~/.zprofile && echo "eval \"\$($(brew --prefix)/bin/brew shellenv)\"" >> ~/.zprofile");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
compiledTemplates.template-4: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("# export HOMEBREW_API_DOMAIN=");t.b("\n" + i);t.b("export HOMEBREW_BREW_GIT_REMOTE=\"");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/brew.git\"");t.b("\n" + i);t.b("brew update");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
compiledTemplates.template-5:
{code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("# 手动设置");t.b("
" + i);t.b("export HOMEBREW_CORE_GIT_REMOTE="");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/homebrew-core.git"");t.b("
");t.b("
" + i);t.b("# 注：自 brew 4.0 起，大部分 Homebrew 用户无需设置 homebrew/core 和 homebrew/cask 镜像，只需设置 HOMEBREW_API_DOMAIN 即可。");t.b("
" + i);t.b("# 如果需要使用 Homebrew 的开发命令 (如 `brew cat <formula>`)，则仍然需要设置 homebrew/core 和 homebrew/cask 镜像。");t.b("
" + i);t.b("# 请按需执行如下两行命令：");t.b("
" + i);t.b("brew tap --custom-remote homebrew/core ");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/homebrew-core.git");t.b("
" + i);t.b("brew tap --custom-remote homebrew/cask ");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/homebrew-cask.git");t.b("
");t.b("
" + i);t.b("# 或使用下面的几行命令自动设置");t.b("
" + i);t.b("export HOMEBREW_CORE_GIT_REMOTE="");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/homebrew-core.git"");t.b("
" + i);t.b("for tap in core cask; do");t.b("
" + i);t.b("    brew tap --custom-remote "homebrew/${tap}" "");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/homebrew-${tap}.git"");t.b("
" + i);t.b("done");t.b("
" + i);t.b("brew update");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}

compiledTemplates.template-8:
{code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("# brew 程序本身，Homebrew / Linuxbrew 相同");t.b("
" + i);t.b("unset HOMEBREW_API_DOMAIN");t.b("
" + i);t.b("unset HOMEBREW_BREW_GIT_REMOTE");t.b("
" + i);t.b("git -C "$(brew --repo)" remote set-url origin https://github.com/Homebrew/brew");t.b("
");t.b("
" + i);t.b("# 以下针对 macOS 系统上的 Homebrew");t.b("
" + i);t.b("unset HOMEBREW_CORE_GIT_REMOTE");t.b("
" + i);t.b("BREW_TAPS="$(BREW_TAPS="$(brew tap 2>/dev/null)"; echo -n "${BREW_TAPS//$'\n'/:}")"");t.b("
" + i);t.b("for tap in core cask; do");t.b("
" + i);t.b("    if [[ ":${BREW_TAPS}:" == *":homebrew/${tap}:"* ]]; then  # 只复原已安装的 Tap");t.b("
" + i);t.b("        brew tap --custom-remote "homebrew/${tap}" "https://github.com/Homebrew/homebrew-${tap}"");t.b("
" + i);t.b("    fi");t.b("
" + i);t.b("done");t.b("
");t.b("
" + i);t.b("# 重新拉取远程");t.b("
" + i);t.b("brew update");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
compiledTemplates.template-9:
{code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("# brew 程序本身，Homebrew / Linuxbrew 相同");t.b("
" + i);t.b("unset HOMEBREW_API_DOMAIN");t.b("
" + i);t.b("unset HOMEBREW_BREW_GIT_REMOTE");t.b("
" + i);t.b("git -C "$(brew --repo)" remote set-url origin https://github.com/Homebrew/brew");t.b("
");t.b("
" + i);t.b("# 以下针对 Linux 系统上的 Linuxbrew");t.b("
" + i);t.b("unset HOMEBREW_API_DOMAIN");t.b("
" + i);t.b("unset HOMEBREW_CORE_GIT_REMOTE");t.b("
" + i);t.b("brew tap --custom-remote homebrew/core https://github.com/Homebrew/homebrew-core");t.b("
");t.b("
" + i);t.b("# 重新拉取远程");t.b("
" + i);t.b("brew update");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
